headline: P&L exposure: ₹45 Cr direct compliance/reputational cost + ₹31 Cr indirect (cost of capital, revenue at risk)
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; event is reputational and investor-facing, not operationally cascading through suppliers.
Triggers BRSR (SEBI), CDP, GRI 305, and TCFD frameworks; non-disclosure or weak disclosure could prompt SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions.
P/E compression risk of 0.05-0.1x due to negative ESG sentiment; margin erosion of 10.0 bps; direct revenue at risk of ₹5.6 Cr if investor/lender relationships weaken.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹45 Cr direct compliance/reputational cost + ₹31 Cr indirect (cost of capital, revenue at risk)
